calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 15,2016:

Karil Daniels, Appellant/Defendant was present.

Jeromie Cohen-Setton and Yasmine Abdillahi, Respondents/Plaintiffs were not present but appeared through their Attorney Julia O. Wobble.
Julio O. Wobble, Associate Attorney (415-504-2165), for Respondent/Plaintiffs.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by Department 206 for trial de novo.

Appellant/Defendant Karil Daniels was sworn in and testifies on her own behalf.

Respondents/Plaintiffs Attorney Julio O. Wobble testifies on behalf of her clients.

Appellant/Defendant Karil Daniels Exhibit No.1 which consists of Residential Lease/ Rental Agreement; Utility Bills; Doctor's Letter dated 7/18/16; Recology Bills for garbage service; Summary what each owes the other dated 8/30/16; E-mails regarding gardening.

Respondents/Plaintifs Jeromie Cohen-Setton and Yasmine Abdillahi Exhibit A. which consists of Declaration of Jeremie Cohen-Setton with attached exhibits A--H.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Appellant/Defendant Karil Daniels Exhibit No.1 is retained by the Court. Respondents/Plaintifs Jeromie Cohen-Setton and Yasmine Abdillahi Exhibit A. is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. matter not reported (D525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Judgment Entered
